reviews.review_text: Love love love this place for a short family holiday. We visited recently and stayed in the chalet with the jacuzzi outside and we were amazing with the size and amenities of our place. It had 2 bathrooms, a spacious living and kitchen area and big bedrooms with big beds. This has become our new favourite place to stay with kids. My only request would be a heated pool for the kids but otherwise fantastic!

Nice little park, walking distance to the beach. However facilities need a little re vamp.  Something needs to be done about toilet doors, it is impossible to get any sleep with the doors slamming every time someone enters and exits ALL hours of the night,  I know lack of peoples consideration is not the park owners fault, but maybe a better door system of some sort so people can sleep during the night?

The park is very peaceful and full of activities for the kids. We loved that our designated parking bay was conveniently located to our cabin. The cabin itself could do with a refresh and a more thorough cleaning, but we would still stay in the future based on the fantastic location and amenities.
Good accommodation for a weekend getaway. Bathroom slightly small and slightly rundown. Otherwise all good

A fabulous park to stay in.  One of our top parks in Australia.  Our friends stayed in lovely modern cabin with all amenities whilst we camped in grounds.  Great bathrooms, modern clean & instant hot showers.  Camo kitchen & Pool! Water park & playground for kids & short walk to beach.  Lovely riding tracks into town along waterfront.  Staff friendly & helpful.  We will come back here again.  Thank you.
The location is great. The staff are very nice and helpful. The only reason it does not get five star is the campsites are very close to each and make the area congested.
Lovely park. Very clean with great trees and sites.  Didnt use the facilities as had an ensuite site reception was pleasant and quick.

We had a powered site. The facilities are good and the sites are a good size. It's a little tight with big vans but as long as others are courteous and move cars when we hook up it's workable.
The beach is so close and beautiful.
Nice clean park and amenities, friendly staff, just a short bike ride into the town centre.

We have just come back from Breeze Resort Busselton. Stayed 5 nights in our caravan. Once again loved it. We have a been few times and every time seems to be even better than the last. Very dog friendly caravan park. Our dog loves it as much as us. A big thank you to the beautiful managers Sue & Craig and their staff, Bec in the office. Very helpfully and the place is spotless. We love our little breaks there.

Stayed here a number of times. Location is good. Girls at front desk friendly enough. Amenities are quite run down and could do with spending money on to refresh as not much has changed over the last 10-15 years

We had 3 seperate booking for 12 days but when checking in they organised us to stay in the same cabin instead of having to move around.
The reception staff were absolutely great. Always pleasant when speaking to them, nothing was a problem.
Staff organised our cabin to be cleaned half way thru our stay

We really enjoyed staying for 4 nights at this Big4 Holiday Park in Busselton in a 2 bedroom cottage with a jacuzzi tub. It was very clean and the amenities provided in the cottage and at the park were excellent. The front office and maintenance staff with friendly and helpful. It is a great location- 5 minutes to a long the sandy beach and a short drive to the jetty and grocery stores.

Our stay: Family of 3 (3 year old) in pop up camper trailer on powered site 68 (next to the toilet block, and close to kitchen / jumping pillow / laundry / pool).

What we loved:
- that it isn't a huge caravan park so didn't feel overcrowded with people even during the busy summer weekend. Everyone was friendly, including the maintenance crew who looked after the grounds daily.
- family friendly park and such a close 2min walk to the beach or walking / bike path
- ground mats on the grass sites
- very clean and well looked after camp kitchen and toilets (although women's showerhead closest to the door may need maintenance)
- family bathroom for those with babies or young toddlers with a bath tub

The place is well managed and responsive to any issues or maintenance that is required. You get given a key for the toilets which can be a bit inconvenient for multiple people needing to shower / toilet etc, perhaps a code lock would be a better option for the bathrooms? Longer term suggestions for the camp kitchen might be a more commercial size fridge / oven.

Location is great, I don't mind not being a close walk to town, it's only 2ish km though along the bike track.

It was also one of the quietest caravan parks we stayed at, lots of older couples in caravans and a few families with lovely kids that stayed during our week at the park.

We had a tent and a gazebo. We asked for lawn but received the site with green mat flooring, which was good. We had great shade and privacy. Maybe a bit too much privacy, as we quite like people watching and a chat here and there. Atleast the people couldn't watch us.
Great facilities and close to everything.Clean too

We stayed in our caravan for two weeks lovely staff happy to help, the ablution blocks were so clean to use,   great location this was our 2nd year staying there. We would highly recommend staying there
just a delight to stay here and look forward  to-the next time

I was looking for a place to stay with our new dog and was thrilled to find that each chalet and campsite was pet friendly. It was so nice to stay in luxury accommodation and know that our dog was welcome as well. The beach is only a short walk away so we enjoyed spending our days swimming or strolling on the sand. There were plenty of other families camping or in caravans but I didn’t notice it was noisy at all. We will definitely be back again, it was the perfect option for us.

Having stayed here before we were really looking forward to returning, however we felt disappointed by a couple of things. The park needs some upgrades. The waterpark for kids was not working, the playground games are not working and parts of the playground needs replacing, the oven in the kitchen is ready for the skip and desperately needs replacing, in fact I would also say one oven isn't enough, the park could use two new ones. In previous years on school holidays there was kids activities each day in the communal area which was such a big hit with our family, but this year there was no activities and no explanation given as to why they were not happening.   It's sad to say that we will at least look into other options for our yearly week down south next January due to the above facts.

To be fair to the park, the staff are brilliant they couldn't be nicer, friendly or more helpful. The food vans were a delight on the couple of nights that they came to the park. The washing machines and dryers are amazing! Toilet and showers are in ok condition, and kept so clean by the staff.

We have always loved this park's location and loved that it is smaller than some of the other parks, meaning kids are able to go off around the park but stay within sight at almost all positions.

If the above problems could be fixed it would mean so much more for this park!

We enjoyed our stay here. The kids loved the pool and play area. The cabin was clean and adequate.  Only 2 complaints. The pool closed too early (5pm). We only get back from a day of sightseeing etc at around that time and love to cool off and chill at the pool. Most  holiday accommodation has their pool open until much later.
The other complaint is, there was no safety rail on the top bunk bed. I was worried that my granddaughter would fall during the night. Other than that all good. The location was good.

We spent 5 nights in a spa cabin . The cabin was  spotlessly  clean and well appointed , even had a dishwasher .
The location was excellent and only a short stroll to the beach .
Staff at reception were happy and extremely helpful , the cleaning staff bent over backwards to provide anything we needed .
We loved this park and will definitely stay again . 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
Staff are amazing and friendly

Fantastic park. Great for  caravaners, poptops, tents and chalets available. Well kept grounds compared with other parks, clean & modern amenities, ease of booking accommodation. Facilities are great- especially big camp kitchen, pool, water playground, bbqs,  jump castle and shaded sights. Professional friendly service keeps us coming back

What a lovely site. Well-kept space, very clean, friendly staff. We had a modern cabin with lots of room for our family. The pool was a delight. The holiday park is just a few minutes walk to the beach in West Busselton. Will definitely book again.
We camped here location was good next to a calm beach for the kids. Facilities are super clean not to busy in there for the kids to roam around.
Staff wonderful and very helpful |Bungalows need fresh renos getting bit tired |We had a great holiday love the park and location to the beach

Great location been coming with so many great families for many years, the park however needs alot of repairs, water park not working, pool to cold to swim in the middle of a hot day, playground rusted, only small patches of grass mostly sand, the people keep us coming back but they need to spend some money to fix up all the basics, cost to stay for a powered site is extremely expensive so these things should be rectified straight away. We love being here but it’s a shame nothing is working or repaired.

Good location, just a short walk to the beach. The pool & bouncing pillow were great for the kids, although could’ve done with access to the toilet block close to the play area. The cabin was okay although the shower was either scalding or cold & it dripped all night. The top bunk had no rail at all but reception were very helpful to supply a portable one when asked.

Not grass, just cement, food was terrible, there was no 24 hour security and no way to complain about the noise after dark, we were two girls and put in between to boys and right in front of the boys toilet….. By far the worst stay. I wish I checked reviews before booking for leavers
So close to everything

Good facilities, great area for the kids to play. Was a shame about the bouncing pillow having a hole in it as a few times the kids couldn't go and bounce, but im sure it'll be fixed inn no time. Everyone was helpful and friendly. Close to the beach and scooter access.
Absolutely love this Big4 right on the beach in Busselton. Fantastic chalets & facilities, the gardens are lovely and well kept. We will be returning for 3rd year running!

Our deluxe cabin had sticky filthy floors, mould and dust smell in the bedrooms, greasy and  dirty dishes, pots and pans, smashed tv, mould smelling washing machine, blocked drains in the showers and basins. ||Sheets in the master bedroom smelled like they hadn’t been changed from the previous guests. ||Mattresses on the bunk bed smelled horrible. ||WiFi did not work all duration of our stay. Reception mentioned that’s how things are. ||Unfortunately couldn’t wait to check out.

Had a pretty good time in this place. First timer and location was great.
Beach, amenities and close IGA
Drive into town 5mins

DO NOT BOOK HERE!

booked to stay here through booking.com, everything seemed to go smoothly, then the night of arrival booking.com took there agreed fee... Breeze holiday parks also took the same fee plus administration fee's, I questioned it on the day and they agreed that it was a mistake and that it would be fixed but after a month of them telling me that they had refunded the amount and it never showed on my account. I then took it to my bank whom agreed that they had infact double dipped. Now they have their bank chasing me for they amount they wrongly took plus some. They have done the wrong thing, the admitted to it but are now committing fraud by advising their bank that the reversal of funds is incorrect. What a joke, it took me 3 months to finally get my money back and they are allowed to make a decision in 10 days on wether they get to honour it or not.
Great little Park in West Busselton with great cabins (bungalows). Nice swimming pool.
Awesome and fresh air
Great place to park your caravan for a night. Just a short walk away from the sea. There is also a path way right in front of the sea for strolling, cycling or jogging.

Saved the best till last! By far the nicest camp site I stayed on in my travels.
I booked two nights at the end of my trip, with a powered slab site (#7). The park location was perfect, easy access both in and out. The facilities were very well maintained and clean. Staff were lovely and helpful.
I was able to do some washing, both the washing machine and dryer were clean and easy to use within a very reasonable time. Would recommend to anyone looking to stay here.
Great stay, have tried a few different types of accommodation here and all are lovely.
We stayed here 4 yrs ago in a bungalow & it’s still just as good. 2 beds 2 baths, laundry, everything you need. 2 min to beach. Can’t fault it.
Great park. A smaller family park with friendly management, clean amenities, new laundry washers and dryers. Larger sites with easy access.
Had a caravan site and a 2 bed cabin. Amenities spotless and cabin clean, well appointed and spacious.

We had a wonderful 3 day stay at BIG4 Breeze Holiday Parks – Busselton in a Deluxe Villa with our family and dog. The park was spotless, spacious, and incredibly well-maintained. Check-in was a breeze and the customer service was friendly and helpful throughout our stay.

Although heavy rain meant the kids couldn’t enjoy the outdoor activities, the park's cleanliness and comfort more than made up for it – and there’s always next time! The location is perfect, just a short walk to the beach, which made for lovely morning walks with our dog.

Huge thanks to the team, your attention to detail and welcoming atmosphere made our stay really special. We’ll definitely be back :)

Very nice park.
Walking distance to town.
Plz for the love of all that is lovely fix your geriatric WiFi
All the staff are amazing I really enjoyed my stay there

I paid $70 last night 1/06/25 for a powered site. I had planned to do some laundry. It turned out that 3 out 4 of washing machines and dryers were out of order. The park was full, this meant that trying to wash and dry cloths took some time. I had 2 loads that took me 4hr to wash and dry. This meant I was stuck in the park for the daylight hours. They told us this had only happened 10 days ago.  It was quite obvious that at least one pair hadn’t been working for some time. If we had been given this info when we arrived we would have left. The dog wash was out of shampoo.  The place was clean and tidy. Other amenities were good.
Great place to stay, friendly staff with good access to town

the room was clean but attention to detail was not considered as curtians in bedroom were ripped and the lounge and dining chairs sunk in not to mention bedroom tv did not work( but did get replaced when told. we also had to pay extra  72 dollars extra for going through a 3rd party wotif .they need to do more maintenance on the grounds and general upkeep of the facility

We have stayed in many chalets in parks in the south West over the years and would rate the accommodation here as the best. The chalet was clean and comfortable and roomy. The park is located a few minutes from Busselton town site. Would stay here again. Value for money.
A comfortable experience.

We stayed for 2 nights in a jacuzzi bungalow. Nice and quiet stay. It was fairly clean and tidy. It's good they leave washing up liquid, soap dishcloths and towels for you plus all the usual utensils for cooking. The jacuzzi was a nice touch. We used the bbq several times whilst there. What let the park down is that there is no cafe/coffee shop on site. As it's nearly a 10 minute drive into the centre of Busselton a cafe on site would have been perfect and would have got it 5 star.

Nice place, although the place smelt like sewerage when the sprinkler system was on
Also the washing  machines were broken and the dryers were insufficient,  cleaner said they have been playing up for awhile

Just had a 3 night stay on a powered tent site,  park itself is clean and quite shady. Check in was smooth, toilets and amenities clean. Camp kitchen quite big and clean. Great swimming pool with small water park next to pool for kids. Jumping pillow in playground which is extremely popular with kids. However, we did not have a relaxing stay. We was situated on site 69 which is literally 2m from the jumping pillow, at first I thought it was great when we arrived as we could watch our child easily in the playground. WRONG! Come 5pm, the playground and jumping pillow was filled with approx 20 kids, screaming, fighting and swearing using the most fowl language using the C word. The pounding of the jumping is embedded in my head, a constant thump thump thump. Not relaxing at all. Especially when you are eating dinner at 6pm and all this is going on. I felt like I was the park baby sitter, especially when one kid was strangled and pushed off the jumping pillow and he was screaming and crying, and when the parent came they looked at me evil as if why didnt I do something? I am not there to babysit.! It was a hassle to get out in the car daily as scooters and bikes were dumped in front of our site, breakfast was just as annoying, trying to eat and the kids would be all on the jumping pillow again at 8/8.30am. If I stay again I will be requesting a sitr far away from the playground. I feel like a need another holiday after this holiday.
Great service great place to stay nice and clean beautiful park beach five minutes away on foot with Rod be back again
Great spot for the kids, and a quick 2 min walk to the beach!

Great well run and maintained small park situated close to the beach.  Staff are freindly and helpful. Amenities are cleaned daily and left in pristine condition. This park has fantastic camp kitchen will two gas barbeques , microwave , oven and two large sinks. there is plenty of room to sit large groups
Had a great few days here with the family good pool and play area for the children quiet

Ant extreme infestation, noisy park with poor staff attitude.    They put us on a site made for a small caravan despite telling them our van was 22 foot.   But what was worse was the intense ant infestations.   A groundskeeper commented to us we shouldn’t park under trees as “we have an ant problem “.  (Most sites are under trees).   Within one day we noticed ants, by day three our caravan was immensely infested from the AC, cupboards, vents, chassis, bed, outside compartments.   We have had to strip the caravan, remove all vents, spray chassis, cupboards, water heater etc.    If they know they have a problem why don’t they fix it.    Avoid this park.

The sites are small but good. The pool is really nice if ya don't feel like goin to the beach. Two  grumbles would be that you aren't allowed to jump, dive, bombie into the pool. So basically...not alot of fun. The toilet/shower block closest to reception definitely needs some TLC.

We loved our stay here .
Love the fact they have pet friendly accommodation.
So close to the beach and the staff are always super friendly.
Perfect location, shady camp sites, short stroll to the beach, great camp kitchen. Only negative was the pool was dirty, didn't get vacumed in the time we stayed.

Loved this park. Fairly small but so friendly and everything you need, a lovely swimming pool and dog friendly.  We don't have kids, but the ones staying seemed to be having the best time. Lovely beach very close by and dogs off leash. We walked lots swam and kayaked in the calm water.  A bit far to walk to the main town area but only a short drive.
Nice clean park.  Great facilities and kids play areas. Excellent location for access to the beach, town and jetty.

Caravan spot under big tree that drops nuts down smashing solar panels !! Showers had two thirds of lights not working ! Shower had no rack for soap or shampoo !
Traffic plan around sites isn't sign posted properly.
Loved this place quiet pet friendly close to everything ❤️ 😊

What a great size park with good ratio of sites to cabins. From the very first phone call Bec in the office & the staff made us feel at home and continued to do so over our stay, 150mtrs to the beach, kitchen & amenities spotless very respectful campers , this place is a must, Thank you Breeze🤝
Good spot, walking distance to beach, good play ground and pool for kids, lots of shade in our spot

Lovely location and excellent accommodation for kids.  The evenings were quiet which we appreciated.  Walking distance from the beach was an added bonus and a short drive to the Busselton Jetty and other conveniences such as shops and restaurants.  Overall an enjoyable week and we are keen to visit again.

We payed 130 dollar for a night powerd site for a caravan. Small place, everyone walked over our place to go to the bathroom! Not worth the money.
Staff very friendly, close to the nice beach

We went down for 4 nights with our dog thoroughly enjoyed our stay our Bungalow was nice and clean lovely fresh white crisp linen on beds with white towels.
Highly recommend location 2 mins walk to thw glorious Geograph Bay where you can take your dog
One recommendation would please install a hose per cabin so when you come back from beach you can hose the sand off both the dog and our feet would truly be a great addition to our stay.
Re Booked already for next year had an amazing time thankyou Breeze holiday park

One of the best caravan park that we have stayed, the first time I see an tv antenna socket in the site bollards. Jumping pillows  and playground and toilets and pool all within eye sight. Very close to the beach. Shared ablution areas was clean. The only thing is laundry, need some improvement, as it can only take in $1 coins.
Great holiday with grandkids

We were lucky to get 2 powered sites as it was school holidays and the park was packed.||Our sites were right beside the pool and kitchen which was a bit noisy during the daylight hours but okay at night.||The park is situated close to the beach, a short drive to town and the Busselton Pier.||Good clean amenities.||Pool and lots of things for children.||Very helpful friendly reception.
Clean, tidy, great vibe

150m from the beach front
Staff are amazing
Facilities are great: Hot showers, bath for kids, heated bathroom floors, bbqs, huge kitchen.
10/10 recommend

Wir waren für 2 Nächte hier Mitte November. Die Duschen& toiletten waren sauber, auch wenn nicht mehr ganz die jüngsten.
Die Waschmaschine funktioniert gut.

Stayed here with my border collie, dog beach was just across the road. staff were fantastic very welcoming great location and setup of park. Our room was great wish I could live there. If your going to Busselton you must stay here.
Only good thing was the location. However, if you are camping, forget about sleeping as it's close to the main road, the kitchen has the least supply and not good customer service or maintenance 😕

The facility for the tenting in the Park is totally insufficient. Only one freeze for the total kitchen facilities, broken TT board, not clean facilities either. I have been to their other Park which was far better than this one. Hope they will improve the facilities.

Stayed in a room with a jacuzzi which was a minimum - 2 night stay. Jacuzzi had issues the first night. Had someone there for half the day trying to fix it on day two. Night two it again had issues. When I left I was told I was offered a full refund and was offered to move rooms for the second night which is definitely wasn't! The service was poor. They were not concerned at all that I had saved all year simply to stay at their accomodation so my children could enjoy the jacuzzi. Was told it could still be used as a bath. Mind you, it took 2 hours to fill up!!
Very clean and good location

The staff were awesome so friendly to deal with. A quick booking process and the Jacuzzi Cabin was perfect for our needs Bbq on decking and washing and dryer in the Cabin  Thanks again we will be back !!!
Very expensive

Have stayed here for a total of 4 weeks over 2 trips.
Beautifully maintained grounds & amenities and
Caravan sites too.
Short walk to beach, friendly and accommodating staff.
Birds abound in the hedges near our van.
Great
Nice, tidy and friendly staff. Pool ia not heated though.
Close to the beach free bike hire and free pedal cart hire great for the kids 👍🏼😊

We Camped in 2 sites right near the jumping pillow.|The receptionist at greeting was very friendly and helpful. |Our site on arrival was very clean and it was pleasing as we were travelling with children that we were close to the jumping pillow, toilets/showers, pool & the kitchen area. All these areas were well maintained.|My only issue is that our site being so close to the jumping pillow that other people continuously walked through our site, ofren tripping over our tent poles etc. It also meant when children *and adults* decided to jump on the jumping pillow at 10pm it was right by us and incredibly loud (not to mention dangerous)|Unfortunately on our 3rd night someone came to our site and the sites around us and stole many of our items that were outside our tents such as an esky, beer, food, chair and Utensils. The site nearnearbyby us had their children's bikes stolen as well as alcohol.|When we approached the front desk about this although they were apologetic they said they "knew" of the man who was doing it which made me wonder why they continued to leave the gates open 24/7 as a single person would need a vehicle to steal the amount of items that were stolen. |Given that we were camping in separate tents to our children this also posed a fear in me that I hadn't heard this man stealing all these items and what if he h|ad attempted to enter a tent?|This really put a dampener on a great weekend.
Great holiday stay dog friendly
Clean park. Good for the kids. Even know the weather was not great. Kids still went for a swim. Yes I would recommend this park.
Great quiet park, great staff and facilities can well recommend.
Excellent spot in Busselton. Great for kids with pool and water play, playground and jumping pillow. Nice big caravan sites with mats.
Great spot close to the CBD. Short walk to the beach and close access to essential facilities.  Very clean and tidy caravan park.
Great place for families

We stayed as a family of three for three nights and absolutely loved this place.
We booked a two bedroom cabin, it had a kitchen, bathroom etc and was very close to the laundry. We loved the spacious porch to sit on in the afternoons while our so rode his bike around the park.
It felt really safe, family friendly and well looked after.
The pool is with a shallower section for little ones. Lots of shade and a water play space too.
The park itself is a 2min walk to the beach, we rode our bikes along the coast path to the Busselton Jetty which took around 15-20mins at the most.
Can’t wait to return, highly recommend.
Toller Pool und Spielplatz, perfekt für Familien mit kleineren Kindern.
Clean and neat cabin rooms, dog friendly and beautiful beach just 200m across. Can do fishing and dog friendly beach.
The location is great, close to amenities. However, the air conditioning wasn't functioning properly, and I couldn't reach the staff after 5 PM despite trying to call and leaving messages.

Big 4 Breeze gets 5 star for communication to customers. So often you wait for hours for parks to return calls but not here. Very professional staff. Grounds are well maintained and tips me lid to the staff as it’s very busy and hard to keep lawn manicured to this level. Ablutions are again very well maintained and always clean and tidy so well ,done to cleaning staff. The park  is only 150mts off Busselton Beach and is an easy walk. Enjoyed our stay and all the friendly staff. Top park in our opinion.
Amazing n beautiful 🌇 sunsets

Stayed in a 2 bedroom spa chalet. Check-in was easy & staff were lovely. Parking was right out the front of the chalet, which was very convenient. The chalet is a little dated but well appointed. Really well-appointed, dog friendly caravan park. Great pool, jumping pillow & playground for the kids. Rated 4 stars purely due to the cleanliness of the room, I'd say it was average at best, lots of sand everywhere including on the beds when we checked in, dusty & the spa bath/shower was pretty grubby. Other than that, loved our stay & we will be back!
Great stay with a dog. Close to a dog beach with clear water and no waves.
Very pleasant and friendly stay

Came down for leavers and had our original site cancel just before we arrived these guys let us book and set up same day with no extra charge, the owner is a great dude and all the staff are brilliant. There is breakfast and dinner every day for a little but more $$ but it's worth it. I'd definitely recommend it in the future. There are showers, toilets, washer, dryer, power, and potable water available. The site is close to pretty much everything

Small older park, friendly staff, short drive into jetty and cafes.
The showers need a good scrub !! We used our van shower instead.
We were surprised it was a Big 4 park, but ok for a quick stop.

Camped on a powered site for 2 nights. I've given 'Rooms' 5 stars because the site had a groundsheet, which made setting up quicker and moving around with wheelchair easier throughout our short stay. Lots of shady trees around, the pool was stunning and also accessible because of a sturdy rail.

The husband and wife management team, Matt and Rebecca are extremely friendly and helpful. They were busy all the time, emptying bins, checking the camp kitchen and amenities were clean and chatting with guests.

The accessible bathroom is modern, beautifully clean and appreciated. A hand drier would've been a nice addition.

Will definitely become BIG4 Members, and look forward to visiting Breeze Busselton and your other accessible parks. Thanks Matt and Rebecca and BIG4.
Great location

The park is lovely, the staff were very welcoming and helpful, even the ground staff were happy to stop for a chat. The toilets and showers were spotless, overall a great stop, and we recommend this park to anyone looking for a stay in Busselton

Very kid friendly park, with heaps for the kids to do.
Nice a quiet even though it's just off the Bussell highway.
You can hire bikes and scooters nearby, there's a bouncing pillow that my kids absolutely loved, small playground and a pool and splash play area.
We had to give them our card information on booking and we were told a price upon delivering the info. When they withdrew the money they had taken more then agreed upon...
Great place to stay

Staff are incredible. Nothing was too much trouble and they were willing to help. Location is beautiful on the beach and facilities and excellent. There’s a newer toilet/shower block as well as an older one but both were clean and well maintained. One of the louder sites I’ve camped at. Of course this isn’t the fault of the staff and I think the smaller size of the place means everyone is in close proximity. Missed the luck of the draw with neighbours who partied loud into the night. Also lucked out with some of our belongings being taken which hasn’t happened anywhere else.
Absolutely loved staying here brought back so many fond memories of staying down in busselton when I was a little kid
We had a powered site ended up staying for 5 nights, sites were a good size and amenities were spotless.  Park was 100mt from the beach and a 5min drive to the town, would recommend this park.
Lovely place,  beats all caravan parks  in Busselton. The team at the park were so friendly and helpful. We will be back
What a fantastic place to stay, the Bungalows were very spacious and clean. Staff at the front desk were very friendly and helpful.
Very clean and bright room, the new owners are doing a great job to keep up with the standard that the park has been over the years, we’ll done, would recommend this to anyone staying in Busselton.
Great little getaway for the family nice clean park with friendly management and facilities to keep the kids entertained!

We’ve just completed a wonderful stay at Breeze Busselton.

The facilities are fantastic - plenty of fun things for the kids to do (pool, playground, jumping pillow, bike hire) with very clean and tidy grounds. The laundry was open 24/7 making it easy to put a late load on - which was ideal for us.

Our cabin was perfect - it was very clean and comfortable, plenty of hot water, ample kitchen supplies, comfy beds. We arrived late and amazingly, the staff had very kindly put the heater and lights on for us and closed the curtains.

The staff we encountered were very friendly and helpful.

We couldn’t be happier with our experience at Breeze, Brusselton.
Great place to stay, not too far from anywhere. Staff were friendly and welcoming. Everything was clean. We had such a good time we went back and spent a couple more days.
Very happy 😁. Great place.
